name: Yield Basis
description: YieldBasis is an on-chain liquidity protocol solving Impermanent Loss problem in AMM pools. It turns crypto into productive assets starting from Bitcoin. Using Yield Basis, LPs have a direct spot exposure to an asset and earn organic yield with significantly improved risk/reward profile (compared to conventional AMMs).

name: Homora V2
description: Homora is the first flagship product incubated under Alpha Venture DAO (previously Alpha Finance Lab) deployed on the Ethereum network in October, 2020. It is the largest multi-chain lending and leveraged yield farming protocol. Homora V2 is currently available on Ethereum, Avalanche, Fantom, Optimism and more coming soon.

name: Origami Finance
description: Origami is a first-in-class automated leverage protocol launching on Ethereum and 🐻

name: Alpaca Leveraged Yield Farming
description: The 1st leveraged yield farming protocol on BSC

name: Extra Finance Leverage Farming
description: Extra Finance is a community-driven lending & leveraged yield farming protocol built on Optimism.

name: Kai Finance
description: Kai Finance is a next-generation leveraged yield platform on the Sui Network.

name: Factor Leverage Vault
description: Factor Leverage Vault is one-click looping, easy switching, easy migration, easy auto-compounding the reward.
